hbe2c1b58gba53g4ebfgb288g2d12eb361c7c: Wakey wakey. Don't bother strugglin' - you ain't goin' nowhere.
h1dfc99b6gb173g4492gb89bg896f969dce62: You might think you're in charge - but you ain't a drow any more. Yer a flesh-puppet.
hee97af9cg0d4bg430fgabbbg2bfbb9168fe8: The Absolute wants to know all about that critter in your head. So start talkin'!
hb0f86baag8150g44a5gad12ga7b8d87ae6c7: I was abducted... a mind flayer infected me with this thing.
h40911aeag61bfg45d2ga05eg9ffe9b5468d6: I know that much. I saw the whole horrible story in your memories.
h8e330586g0f4eg445ag96b3g92b96dd08fa4: And I know what happens next. Your teeth fall out, your skin rips off, and you turn into one of them.
hc48ff76bgc1f1g4d68g8209gdd100f8c1cdd: You're out of luck. I don't know any more about it than you do.
h08340ab3gcd32g491fg9304g70a41e9e1353: Liar! We've both seen the monster that put it there. And I know what happens next.
hc00a0a60g956fg486fgaa74gc4a53825173f: If I set you free, you'll be sucking out my brains as soon as I turn my back.
h7eb51178gfa4ag48f9g933dg16154918dbf5: That creature's turning your brain into broth, boiling away your memories.
h12c33fd8gaeb0g4818g8753ge069ab551950: Do you even know who you are any more?
h637cb244g31a9g4882g98e1g2080e38c71fd: Maybe that's wot the creature wants you to think.
hd3807faeg0f31g42eeg8701g561f24c9e82f: It's gonna start eating your flesh, too. Changing you.
hc8dafcf0g4ce3g4d18g9846gca69f616080b: And eventually your skull will split and you'll cough up a mess of tentacles.
ha21fa76ag3127g4b60g84a9ge1d9fbf47a2b: Stop it? Why would I wanna do that?
hf0ce325bg8f73g4ba1gacbdgc5d7ec108718: I'm gonna keep you here so I can see every gory detail, and hear every whimper and scream.
h8b2a7a9agdbafg449fgabddgcb7030664cf8: If I do transform, you'll be my first meal.
he2daf6efg519cg461cg80c0g5a78dcc4cdc7: Not likely. You're forgetting one thing - I've got the Absolute to protect me.
h8fd55ed1ge696g40aag9197g8d5386f561e7: But you? You're on your own. Nothing more than a skin-suit for that monster inside you.
h6c301e89g1cc3g4e82gb370gbf42a6b11729: You're gonna be my new pet. A ferocious squiddie, all for myself.
h6035daf8g89c9g47c2gac7cg480def275924: No, I'm not going to let that happen.
h8ce5a256gffd5g40d4g84e6g560a93e01e6c: Think you're special, do you? You're not.
h84b4ef73g1dddg404eg8508ge204748feda1: You're infected. The same thing will happen to you.
hd81fe8ebge0bag41cegbbaag13c9a838262f: Lies! I'm stronger than ever. And I've got the Absolute on my side.
h5fd59bf8ge685g4662g9574g8e6830896ce1: You won't live to see it, trust me.
h198e0a4dg9ee6g4b01gb343gbc01810b94a3: You might have put up a fight in another life, freak. But not in this one.
h669f133dg10deg4a1fg9699g5b9da4c76d4d: I have... powers. Something's changing in me.
h4a33736ag88cfg45c3gbfa5ge3bcab64c19a: Powers? No. They're delusions. That thing's eating your brain.
h764e37e8gce8dg4b7bgb7a2g56dcb1b9f026: I know I'm going to kill you. How about that?
h35344677gdf75g494ag9b23gf0fe1debe2b5: You ain't gonna lay a finger on me. You're finished.
hb828e666gb2c1g4117g91c7gf9258eeae67f: And I don't have to do nothing but wait. That thing inside your head is gonna eat your brain from the inside out.
h68f6e396g8db6g4d7fgb1beg017d7ec4efb0: I am the Demonsbane, champion of Avernus. You don't frighten me.
h784b6a6bgc878g4439g8d22g4c87e779dd3e: It's not me you need to be frightened of - it's what that thing in your head is gonna do to you.
h13146b09g44b7g4099g86c9g6985eda55da8: | [LAE'ZEL] *I told her I was a mighty gith.* |
h3cc45064g5483g43aega89eg07904860c32e: | [SHADOWHEART] *I told her I was Shar's chosen.* |
hcf40b628gde1fg42ecgb83dgd066da1c3429: | [WYLL] *I told her I was the Blade of the Frontiers.* |
he72b724bg14edg4e9ag85feg6469ffb2e3b5: Weren't you supposed to be helping me?
hfd48dd20g39bcg49a1g88acga8569712884a: It's too late to help you. It already was.
h29593f32g2c78g43d2gb13cgbcbf07f15d45: You're infected. It's going to happen to you too.
h305f7b28ge38eg415agbc7dg3f64b2703b5a: Stop trying to confuse me. You're a liar.
h46817a8dg69ceg468bg89d6g26cb6eb62f84: Everything's clear since the Absolute chose me. You're the one that's broken.
h1037e6feg86bfg4689ga168g9c48af43d1e5: I'll make you pay for this, goblin.
hdd23919dg2789g40e7g8486g8868796ede66: Can't beat you too hard though. Got to keep you alive for what comes next.
